log_lines: INFO: Node memory pressure detected on node worker-03
WARNING: Evicting pod log-aggregator-4fe2a9-cs1hb due to node memory pressure
Event: The node was low on resource: memory. Threshold quantity: 100Mi, available: 87Mi

expected.notes: Pod evicted by kubelet due to node-level memory pressure, not by container OOM limit — node itself needs more memory or noisy-neighbor workloads must be evicted first
